commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer live reconnect proof for an external PR, not a narrow automated code repair.; Cleared: The diff is limited to Control UI/Gateway TypeScript and tests; I found no concrete security or supply-chain concern. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Control UI Webchat queue sends so same-scope reconnects can retry in-flight sends, stale send completions do not remove replayed queue items, gateway-scope changes do not replay old sends, and in-flight queue entries cannot be removed.

PR surface: Source +50, Tests +290. Total +340 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main stops the old Gateway client with a non-retryable 'gateway client stopped' Error while Webchat only requeues retryable or gateway-closed-style send failures. I did not run a live browser race because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer live reconnect proof for an external PR, not a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: fix(ui): preserve chat sends across reconnect
target.body:
## Summary

- Keep in-flight Webchat sends tied to the current send attempt so stale pre-reconnect completions cannot remove or duplicate replayed queued messages.
- Mark stopped same-scope Gateway requests as retryable, while preventing gateway-scope changes from replaying old in-flight sends.
- Hide and ignore remove actions for messages already being sent.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (132 tests passed after rebase)
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.ui.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-ui.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/gateway.ts ui/src/ui/chat/chat-queue.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`
- `node scripts/check-no-raw-window-open.mjs`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- `git diff --check`

`node --import tsx scripts/control-ui-i18n.ts check` currently fails on latest `upstream/main` due to unrelated raw-copy baseline drift in `ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.ts` from upstream commit `1e3542bbe7a986ebd920a827aafe47f076f381d5`; this branch does not touch that file.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Webchat queued sends can survive same-gateway reconnect races without stale old `chat.send` completions removing the replayed send, and gateway-scope changes do not mark old pending sends retryable.

Real environment tested: Actual local OpenClaw Gateway from this branch, isolated `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR`, auth disabled on loopback port `19123`, and Google Chrome loading the real Control UI at `http://127.0.0.1:19123/chat`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```text
OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/tmp/openclaw-webchat-proof.HmxgCQ/state \
OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-webchat-proof.HmxgCQ/state/openclaw.json \
pnpm openclaw gateway run --dev --allow-unconfigured --auth none --bind loopback --port 19123 --force --verbose

node --input-type=module <local Chrome WebChat proof script>
```

Evidence after fix: Terminal capture from the live WebChat proof:

```text
2026-05-31T10:51:35.605+08:00 [gateway] http server listening (9 plugins: acpx, bonjour, browser, canvas, device-pair, file-transfer, memory-core, phone-control, talk-voice; 2.4s)
2026-05-31T10:51:35.628+08:00 [gateway] ready

REAL_WEBCHAT_PROOF
url=http://127.0.0.1:19123/chat
send.method=chat.send
send.sessionKey=agent:dev:main
send.deliver=false
send.message=live proof webchat send queue smoke
send.idempotencyKey=f4aae40c-b566-4b26-a3b7-06a2ab3f1189
ack.ok=true
screenshot=/tmp/openclaw-webchat-proof.HmxgCQ/live-webchat-send.png
```

Observed result after fix: The real WebChat page sent through the actual Gateway WebSocket path with `deliver=false`, a stable idempotency key, and an acknowledged `chat.send` request from the isolated Gateway. The focused regression suite additionally covers same-scope reconnect replay, gateway-scope-change non-replay, stale completion suppression, and in-flight queue remove behavior.

What was not tested: A manually timed live ACK-loss race against the real Gateway. Broad Testbox/Crabbox proof was blocked locally because the `crabbox` binary failed the repo wrapper sanity check / was unavailable.
